context: Tests whether the agent produces a complete Phase 2 methodology document with a justified architecture pattern, high-level component list, and technology stack with rationale — and correctly marks methodology_accepted in state.json — while avoiding component implementation details, API contracts, and detailed tech configurations.

checklist.name: Pattern chosen
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md names a specific architecture pattern (e.g. modular monolith, microservices, event-driven)

checklist.name: Pattern justified
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md provides a rationale for why the chosen pattern fits the requirements, constraints, or team context

checklist.name: Component list defined
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md includes a list of high-level components or modules (at least 3)

checklist.name: Technology stack specified
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md names specific technologies for at least two distinct concerns (e.g. language, database, infrastructure)

checklist.name: Technology rationale provided
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md explains the rationale for each or most technology choices — not just a list

checklist.name: No component API contracts
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md does NOT include specific API endpoint definitions, request/response schemas, or data models for individual components

checklist.name: No detailed tech config
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md does NOT include detailed technology configurations (e.g. specific database index settings, Kubernetes manifests, environment variable lists)

checklist.name: Linked to Phase 1 requirements
checklist.description: phase2-methodology.md references at least one constraint, NFR, or requirement from Phase 1 when justifying the pattern or technology choices

checklist.name: State phase updated
checklist.description: The output .arch/state.json reflects Phase 2 (methodology) as accepted or completed — either via `methodology_accepted: true` or a status field update
